title: AI Engineer
description:
About InvoiceCloud:

InvoiceCloud is a fast-growing fintech leader recognized
with 20 major awards in 2025, including USA TODAY and Boston
Globe Top Workplaces, multiple SaaS Awards wins for Best
Solution for Finance and FinTech, and national customer
service honors from Stevie and the Business Intelligence
Group. Judges also highlighted our mission to reduce digital
exclusion and restore simplicity and dignity to how people
pay for essential services, as well as our leadership in AI
maturity and responsible innovation. It’s an award-winning,
purpose-driven environment where top talent thrives. To
learn more, visit InvoiceCloud.com.

Job Details

The AI Engineer designs, builds, and optimizes AI- and ML-
powered capabilities that increase intelligence and
automation across the InvoiceCloud platform. This role
delivers production-grade AI features, improves modern AI
architecture, and advances experimentation, deployment, and
performance of AI systems at scale.



The AI Engineer collaborates closely with engineering,
product, and platform teams to translate requirements into
reliable, scalable solutions while improving developer
productivity through reusable components, frameworks, and
automation.



Success Profile

At InvoiceCloud, success is anchored in our core
competencies. These competencies guide how every employee
delivers impact across their role



Takes Ownership

- Owns delivery of complex AI-driven product features from
  design through production.
- Builds and maintains secure, reliable AI pipelines, APIs,
  and monitoring capabilities.
- Troubleshoots and resolves model performance, inference, and
  deployment issues in production environments.
- Partners with engineering and product teams to ensure
  solutions are delivered accurately, consistently, and on
  schedule.
- Maintains accountability for system reliability,
  observability, and long-term maintainability.



Drives Efficiency

- Improves model accuracy, scalability, latency, and
  operational performance through disciplined optimization.
- Designs reusable AI components, services, and frameworks
  that accelerate development and reduce rework.
- Implements and refines MLOps workflows to streamline
  experimentation, testing, and deployment.
- Uses automation and tooling to increase developer
  productivity and reduce manual effort.
- Applies data-driven evaluation and monitoring to ensure
  continuous improvement.



Innovative

- Experiments with GenAI and LLM frameworks such as LangChain,
  Semantic Kernel, and Azure OpenAI.
- Researches and applies emerging AI techniques to enhance
  platform intelligence and automation.
- Uses AI-assisted tools to accelerate prototyping, testing,
  and iteration.
- Identifies new opportunities where AI can deliver measurable
  product and operational impact.
- Contributes to evolving AI architecture patterns and best
  practices across the platform.



Customer Centric

- Designs AI capabilities that improve user experience,
  operational outcomes, and product value.
- Incorporates feedback loops, evaluation metrics, and usage
  data to refine model behavior over time.
- Ensures AI solutions align with responsible AI standards,
  security requirements, and compliance expectations.
- Collaborates with cross-functional partners to ensure AI
  features solve real customer problems.



Requirements

- 5+ years of software engineering experience, with 2–3 years
  building AI, ML, or LLM-based applications
- Hands-on experience deploying AI models into production
  environments
- Strong proficiency in Python and familiarity with C#
- Experience with Azure OpenAI, LangChain, Semantic Kernel,
  FastAPI, and vector databases
- Experience implementing retrieval-augmented generation (RAG)
  or vector search systems
- Strong understanding of prompt engineering, model
  evaluation, inference optimization, and observability
- Experience designing and operating AI pipelines, APIs, and
  monitoring solutions
- Strong analytical, communication, and collaboration skills

InvoiceCloud is committed to providing equal employment
opportunities to all employees and applicants. We do not
tolerate discrimination or harassment of any kind based on
race, color, religion, age, sex, nationality, disability,
genetic information, veteran or military status, sexual
orientation, gender identity or expression, or any other
characteristic protected under applicable laws.

This commitment applies to all aspects of employment,
including recruitment, hiring, placement, promotion,
termination, layoff, recall, transfer, leave, compensation,
and training.

If you require a disability-related or religious
accommodation during the application or recruitment process,
and wish to discuss possible adjustments, please contact
jobs@invoicecloud.com.

Click here to review InvoiceCloud’s Job Applicant Privacy
Policy.

For recruitment agencies: InvoiceCloud does not accept
unsolicited resumes from agencies. Please do not forward
resumes to our job aliases, employees, or any other company
location. InvoiceCloud is not responsible for any fees
associated with unsolicited submissions.
responsibilities: Design, build, and optimize AI- and ML-powered capabilities that increase intelligence and automation across the InvoiceCloud platform
Deliver production-grade AI features and improve modern AI architecture while advancing experimentation, deployment, and performance of AI systems at scale
Build and maintain secure, reliable AI pipelines, APIs, and monitoring capabilities
Troubleshoot and resolve model performance, inference, and deployment issues in production environments
Improve model accuracy, scalability, latency, and operational performance through disciplined optimization
Design reusable AI components, services, and frameworks that accelerate development and reduce rework
Implement and refine MLOps workflows to streamline experimentation, testing, and deployment
Experiment with GenAI and LLM frameworks such as LangChain, Semantic Kernel, and Azure OpenAI
use_cases: Automated invoice processing and payment intelligence
Enhanced user experience through AI-powered platform capabilities
Operational efficiency improvements through intelligent automation
Responsible AI applications for financial services
Vector-based information retrieval and knowledge management
Compliance-aligned AI features for fintech operations
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role requires hands-on experience building and
deploying AI, ML, and LLM-based applications into
production. The engineer works directly with GenAI
frameworks, RAG systems, vector databases, and model
inference optimization, indicating they are building and
deploying AI systems rather than just supporting them.
